title: Clarify — triage asks to narrow scope before researching
description: When a request is too vague to research usefully, triage should return a 'Need to narrow the scope first' step and ask a clarifying question instead of burning a search wave on an unanswerable ask.

points.label: Clarify: vague ask gets a narrowing question
points.summary: An under-specified request should make the pipeline ASK what you mean (budget, region, use-case) rather than research blindly. PASS = a short clarifying question; FAIL = it invents a scope and runs a full search anyway.
